name: Shrimp Scampi Gambino-Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean, devein and butterfly the shrimp.
2. Place them in a large, flat pan.
3. In a bowl, mix together butter, shallots, garlic, lemon juice, parsley, bread crumbs, egg yolk, Accent, hot sauce, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Spoon the mixture over the raw shrimp.
5. Place under broiler for 3-5 minutes, checking occasionally not to overcook.
6. Spoon excess sauce over shrimp and serve.
